Property.Name: IDEnumDefinedValues
Property.Value: AES, AES, AES; BLOWFISH, BLOWFISH, BLOWFISH; CAMELLIA, CAMELLIA, CAMELLIA; CAST5, CAST5, CAST5; CAST6, CAST6, CAST6; DES, DES, DES; TRIPLEDES, TRIPLEDES, TRIPLEDES; DSTU7624_128, DSTU7624_128, DSTU7624_128; DSTU7624_256, DSTU7624_256, DSTU7624_256; DSTU7624_512, DSTU7624_512, DSTU7624_512; GOST28147, GOST28147, GOST28147; NOEKEON, NOEKEON, NOEKEON; RC2, RC2, RC2; RC532, RC532, RC532; RC564, RC564, RC564; RC6, RC6, RC6; RIJNDAEL_128, RIJNDAEL_128, RIJNDAEL_128; RIJNDAEL_160, RIJNDAEL_160, RIJNDAEL_160; RIJNDAEL_192, RIJNDAEL_192, RIJNDAEL_192; RIJNDAEL_224, RIJNDAEL_224, RIJNDAEL_224; RIJNDAEL_256, RIJNDAEL_256, RIJNDAEL_256; SEED, SEED, SEED; SERPENT, SERPENT, SERPENT; SKIPJACK, SKIPJACK, SKIPJACK; SM4, SM4, SM4; TEA, TEA, TEA; THREEFISH_256, THREEFISH_256, THREEFISH_256; THREEFISH_512, THREEFISH_512, THREEFISH_512; THREEFISH_1024, THREEFISH_1024, THREEFISH_1024; TWOFISH, TWOFISH, TWOFISH; XTEA, XTEA, XTEA
